case_title: ROBERT YUEN VS. ARIES CONSTRUCTION CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ARIES CONSTRUCTION CORP.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL MAU FILED BY YUEN, ROBERT ARIES CONSTRUCTION CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YUEN, ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARIES CONSTRUCTION CORP. JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-19-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF YUEN, ROBERT
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO SEP-19-2012 AT 10:00 AM DEPT.#506 - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YUEN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT ARIES CONSTRUCTION CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 80.00 - SERVED MAY-30-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARIES CONSTRUCTION CORP.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ARIES CONSTRUCTION CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ALBERT SETO.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
